sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98116" key="sukope/dilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡκο-πέδῑλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n98116.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fig-sandaled</tr_>, a parody on Homer's <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρυσοπέδιλος</foreign>, with a play on <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συκοφάντης</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
